---
title: "Repository List"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

This document lists repositories in the [IPBES-Data GitHub organization](https://github.com/IPBES-Data).

```{r}
source("scripts/site_data_utils.R")

tg_directory_page <- "https://ipbes-data.github.io/IPBES_TG_Directory/"

inputs <- load_site_inputs()
assessments <- inputs$assessments
tg_labels_fallback <- inputs$tg_labels_fallback

repo_result <- get_org_repos_for_repos(org = "IPBES-Data")
repos <- repo_result$data
repo_source <- repo_result$source

tg_result <- load_tg_labels(tg_labels_fallback, directory_url = tg_directory_page)
tg_pages <- tg_result$data
tg_source <- tg_result$source

if (nrow(repos) > 0 && nrow(tg_pages) > 0) {
  tg_repo_names <- repos$repo_name[grepl("^IPBES_TG_", repos$repo_name)]
  tg_pages <- tg_pages[tg_pages$repo_name %in% tg_repo_names, , drop = FALSE]
  tg_pages <- order_tg_labels(tg_pages)
}

assessment_repo_summary <- summarize_assessment_repositories(repos, assessments, repo_name_col = "repo_name")
assessment_repos <- assessment_repo_summary$data

assessment_lookup <- unique(data.frame(
  assessment_abbreviation = toupper(assessments$abbreviation),
  Assessment = assessments$short_name,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
))

format_archived <- function(x) {
  ifelse(is.na(x), "Unknown", ifelse(x, "Yes", "No"))
}
```

## Assessment-Related Repositories

Repository source for dynamic lists: `r repo_source`.

```{r}
if (nrow(assessment_repos) == 0) {
  cat("No assessment-related repositories found.")
} else {
  assessment_repos$assessment_abbreviation <- toupper(assessment_repos$assessment_abbreviation)
  assessment_repos <- merge(
    assessment_repos,
    assessment_lookup,
    by = "assessment_abbreviation",
    all.x = TRUE,
    sort = FALSE
  )

  assessment_repos$Assessment <- ifelse(
    is.na(assessment_repos$Assessment) | !nzchar(assessment_repos$Assessment),
    assessment_repos$assessment_abbreviation,
    assessment_repos$Assessment
  )

  assessment_order <- match(assessment_repos$assessment_abbreviation, assessment_lookup$assessment_abbreviation)
  assessment_repos <- assessment_repos[order(assessment_order, tolower(assessment_repos$repo_name)), , drop = FALSE]

  assessment_repos$Repository <- paste0(
    "<a href='", assessment_repos$url, "' target='_blank' rel='noopener'>", assessment_repos$repo_name, "</a>"
  )
  assessment_repos$Archived <- format_archived(assessment_repos$archived)

  out <- assessment_repos[, c("Assessment", "Repository", "description", "Archived")]
  names(out) <- c("Assessment", "Repository", "Description", "Archived")

  DT::datatable(
    out,
    escape = FALSE,
    rownames = FALSE,
    filter = "top",
    options = list(
      pageLength = 25,
      autoWidth = TRUE
    )
  )
}
```

## Technical Guidelines

Names are taken from the published TG Directory page (source: `r tg_source`).

```{r}
if (nrow(tg_pages) == 0) {
  cat("No technical guideline pages found.")
} else {
  tg_meta <- repos[repos$repo_name %in% tg_pages$repo_name, c("repo_name", "url", "description", "archived"), drop = FALSE]
  tg_table <- merge(tg_pages, tg_meta, by = "repo_name", all.x = TRUE, sort = FALSE)

  tg_table$Name <- paste0(
    "<a href='", tg_table$page_url, "' target='_blank' rel='noopener'>", tg_table$title, "</a>"
  )
  tg_table$Repository <- ifelse(
    !is.na(tg_table$url) & nzchar(tg_table$url),
    paste0("<a href='", tg_table$url, "' target='_blank' rel='noopener'>", tg_table$repo_name, "</a>"),
    tg_table$repo_name
  )
  tg_table$Description <- ifelse(is.na(tg_table$description), "", tg_table$description)
  tg_table$Archived <- format_archived(tg_table$archived)

  out <- tg_table[, c("Name", "Repository", "Description", "Archived")]

  DT::datatable(
    out,
    escape = FALSE,
    rownames = FALSE,
    filter = "top",
    options = list(
      pageLength = 25,
      autoWidth = TRUE
    )
  )
}
```

## Other Repositories

```{r}
if (nrow(repos) == 0) {
  cat("Repository data is currently unavailable from the GitHub API.")
} else {
  assessment_repo_names <- if (nrow(assessment_repos) > 0) assessment_repos$repo_name else character(0)

  other_repos <- repos[
    !(repos$repo_name %in% assessment_repo_names) & !grepl("^IPBES_TG_", repos$repo_name),
    ,
    drop = FALSE
  ]

  if (nrow(other_repos) == 0) {
    cat("No other repositories found.")
  } else {
    other_repos <- other_repos[order(tolower(other_repos$repo_name)), , drop = FALSE]
    other_repos$Repository <- paste0(
      "<a href='", other_repos$url, "' target='_blank' rel='noopener'>", other_repos$repo_name, "</a>"
    )
    other_repos$Description <- other_repos$description
    other_repos$Archived <- format_archived(other_repos$archived)

    out <- other_repos[, c("Repository", "Description", "Archived")]

    DT::datatable(
      out,
      escape = FALSE,
      rownames = FALSE,
      filter = "top",
      options = list(
        pageLength = 25,
        autoWidth = TRUE
      )
    )
  }
}
```
